The '''Arkanian blaster rifle''' was a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] used during the time of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and its aftermath. The design, created by the [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanians]], could equal that of modern [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. The one problem faced with these weapons was their lack of upgrade options as they could not accept newer firing chambers and power cells.

{{Weapon-stub}}
